metadata.title: Spanish Language Assurance for AI, Product & CX Teams | Xpandia
metadata.description: Xpandia helps AI, SaaS, EdTech, Product, Localization, and CX teams validate Spanish quality across AI outputs, product experiences, support content, and launch-ready journeys.
metadata.ogTitle: Spanish Language Assurance for AI, Product & CX Teams | Xpandia
metadata.ogDescription: Xpandia helps AI, SaaS, EdTech, Product, Localization, and CX teams validate Spanish quality across AI outputs, product experiences, support content, and launch-ready journeys.

hero.subheadline: Xpandia helps AI, SaaS, EdTech, Product, Localization, and CX teams evaluate Spanish quality across AI outputs, product experiences, support content, and launch-ready journeys.
hero.body: We turn expert Spanish judgment into measurable findings your team can act on: scorecards, issue taxonomies, severity ratings, readiness recommendations, and remediation guidance.

proofPoints.title: AI outputs
proofPoints.desc: Chatbots, copilots, tutors, agents, and support flows.

proofPoints.title: Product readiness
proofPoints.desc: UX copy, onboarding, forms, errors, and launch journeys.

proofPoints.title: Decision-ready evidence
proofPoints.desc: Scorecards, severity ratings, issue logs, and executive readouts.

positioning.headline: Spanish quality is too important to leave unmeasured.
positioning.body1: Spanish-speaking users experience your product through language: the answers your AI gives, the instructions your product provides, the support content they trust, and the messages that guide their decisions.
positioning.body2: When Spanish quality is inconsistent, unnatural, culturally misaligned, or hard to understand, teams lose clarity, trust, adoption, and confidence before they even know where the issue started.
positioning.body3: Language Assurance gives your team a structured way to evaluate what is working, what needs attention, how severe each issue is, and whether the experience is ready for real users.
positioning.callout: The goal is simple: help your team know whether your Spanish is accurate, natural, trustworthy, culturally appropriate, and ready to ship.

whatWeEvaluate.headline: Spanish quality across every user-facing surface.
whatWeEvaluate.intro: Language Assurance can be applied to any Spanish experience your users see, read, hear, follow, or rely on.

cards.title: AI-generated outputs
cards.desc: Chatbot responses, AI tutors, copilots, agents, support replies, generated explanations, summaries, recommendations, and other model outputs in Spanish.

cards.title: Product experiences
cards.desc: Onboarding flows, UI copy, forms, empty states, error messages, notifications, tooltips, checkout flows, and release-critical product surfaces.

cards.title: Support and CX content
cards.desc: Help center articles, support macros, chatbot flows, escalation language, knowledge base content, and customer-facing communication.

cards.title: Localization quality
cards.desc: Translated or localized experiences that need expert review, consistency checks, regional fit, terminology alignment, or final sign-off.

cards.title: Launch readiness
cards.desc: Spanish product surfaces, AI experiences, or customer journeys that need validation before launch, relaunch, deployment, or scale.

cards.title: Marketing and conversion content
cards.desc: Landing pages, campaign copy, email flows, pricing pages, value propositions, trust messaging, and Spanish conversion paths.

whenToUse.headline: Use Language Assurance when Spanish quality needs a decision.
items: Your AI generates Spanish outputs, but your team needs to know if users can trust them.
Your product is translated or localized, but you are unsure if it feels natural, clear, and ready.
Your team is preparing a Spanish launch, relaunch, release, or market expansion.
Your support, help center, or chatbot experience in Spanish needs quality validation.
Your team relies on vendors, reviewers, or internal speakers without a clear QA framework.
Your leadership team needs evidence, not opinions, before deciding what to fix or ship.

engagements.headline: Focused audits and advisory for teams that need confidence before shipping Spanish experiences.
engagements.intro: Audits and advisory scoped around your product, audience, AI use case, and risk level.

items.name: AI Spanish Quality Audit Sprint
items.bestFor: Teams with AI outputs, chatbot responses, tutors, copilots, support agents, or generative AI experiences operating in Spanish.
items.outcome: Understand quality risks, scoring, issue patterns, and readiness before users rely on the experience.

items.name: Spanish Launch Readiness Audit
items.bestFor: Teams launching or preparing a Spanish website, app, onboarding flow, support journey, AI experience, or customer-facing product surface.
items.outcome: Identify what affects clarity, trust, UX, cultural fit, and readiness before launch or relaunch.

items.name: Spanish Quality Advisory
items.bestFor: Teams that need senior Spanish quality judgment, QA criteria, review workflows, vendor/reviewer alignment, terminology guidance, or recurring quality decisions.
items.outcome: Build a practical Spanish quality system your team can use to make better decisions, reduce review friction, and scale Spanish quality with confidence.

additionalModules.headline: Add the level of assurance your project needs.
additionalModules.body: Depending on scope, Language Assurance engagements can include conversational chatbot audits, AI output benchmarks, language sign-off, retesting, terminology checks, or lightweight governance support.

methodology.headline: A structured path from Spanish review to release confidence.
methodology.intro: Every Language Assurance engagement follows a clear process designed to move your team from uncertainty to evidence.

steps.title: Scope the surface
steps.body: We define your audience, Spanish variant, product surface, AI use case, content type, business objective, risk level, and timeline.

steps.title: Evaluate quality
steps.body: We review the selected material using expert Spanish judgment and structured criteria: accuracy, clarity, naturalness, tone, terminology, regional fit, cultural fit, UX friction, and readiness.

steps.title: Score and classify
steps.body: We organize findings by severity, impact, pattern, and implementation effort so your team can understand what matters most.

steps.title: Deliver the evidence
steps.body: You receive decision-ready findings your team can use immediately: scorecards, annotated examples, issue logs, severity ratings, prioritized recommendations, rewrites, standards, and executive readouts.

steps.title: Decide the next move
steps.body: We recommend the right path forward: ship, fix, retest, adapt, train, govern, or scale.

finalCta.headline: Know if your Spanish is ready before users decide for you.
finalCta.body: Book a diagnostic call to review your Spanish surface, audience, use case, timeline, and business goal. We'll recommend the right Language Assurance path: diagnostic, AI QA sprint, launch readiness audit, retest, sign-off, or advisory.
